items.headline: NHL EDGE stats leaders for 2025-2026 season
items.description:
NHL.com's fantasy staff continues to cover the latest trends and storylines in the League through the lens of NHL EDGE puck and player tracker stats. Throughout the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs, we will identify the leaders in key advanced metrics.
\---

items.headline: William Karlsson could return to Vegas Golden Knights lineup in second round
items.description: LAS VEGAS -- William Karlsson will play for the Vegas Golden Knights against the Anaheim Ducks in Game 1 of the Western Conference Second Round at T-Mobile Arena on Monday (9:30 p.m. ET; ESPN, SN360, SN, TVAS).

items.headline: Masterson Trophy finalists for 2025-2026 announced by NHL
items.description: NEW YORK – Buffalo Sabres defenseman Rasmus Dahlin, Colorado Avalanche forward Gabriel Landeskog and Winnipeg Jets forward Jonathan Toews are the three finalists for the 2025-26 Bill Masterton Memorial Trophy, which is awarded “to the player who best exemplifies the qualities of perseverance, sportsmanship and dedication to hockey,” the National

items.headline: 2026 NHL Draft Lottery drama to play out in real time
items.description:
For the second straight year, the drama of the NHL Draft Lottery will play out in real time for all to see.

items.headline: Top international prospects Ivar Stenberg Alberts Smits discussed on NHL Draft Class
items.description: The 2026 Upper Deck NHL Draft will be held June 26-27 at KeyBank Center in Buffalo. The first round will be held June 26 (7 p.m. ET; ESPN, ESPN+, Sportsnet, TVA Sports) with rounds 2-7 on June 27 (10 a.m. ET; NHLN, ESPN+, Sportsnet). NHL.com is counting down to the

items.headline: King Clancy 2026 nominee essay: Kyle Palmieri
items.description: Editor's Note: The King Clancy Memorial Trophy is presented annually to the NHL player who best exemplifies leadership qualities on and off the ice and has made a noteworthy humanitarian contribution in his community. items.headline: Stanley Cup Playoffs second chance bracket
items.description: NEW YORK -- Close games and surprising outcomes have busted brackets in the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs Bracket Challenge presented by Expedia. Now, fans can have a fresh start with the Stanley Cup Playoffs Second Chance Bracket presented by Expedia. Fans can now submit a new bracket at NHL.com/Bracket with

items.headline: Why Tampa Bay Lightning are eliminated from 2025-2026 postseason
items.description:
TAMPA -- The Tampa Bay Lightning were eliminated from the Stanley Cup Playoffs with a 2-1 loss to the Montreal Canadiens in Game 7 of the Eastern Conference First Round on Sunday, the fourth consecutive season they have failed to advance past the opening round.
The Lightning (50-26-6) finished second

items.headline: Avalanche, Wild trade punches in high-scoring Game 1
items.description:
DENVER -- For the first 11 minutes of Game 1 of the Western Conference Second Round at Ball Arena on Sunday, it was quiet.
Clearly the quiet was misleading because a few seconds later, it started. Goals. So, so many goals.

items.headline: Minnesota Wild Colorado Avalanche game 1 recap May 3 2026
items.description: DENVER -- Cale Makar scored twice in the third period and had an assist for the Colorado Avalanche, who recovered for a 9-6 win against the Minnesota Wild in Game 1 of the Western Conference Second Round at Ball Arena on Sunday.
